_readme: Copy to clr.config.json in your project root. Everything defaults to ON — only add the keys you want to change. This file mirrors the built-in defaults; each _doc key documents its sibling and is ignored by the plugin.
_enabled_doc: Master switch. false disables the reporter entirely (no warning).
_debug_doc: Log every send + swallowed error to the console. CLR_DEBUG=1 env var does the same.

events._runLifecycle_doc: run:start / spec:start / spec:end / run:end from the Node side.
events._liveTests_doc: test:start / test:attempt:end from the browser — the live per-it-block feed.

screenshots._enabled_doc: Ship failure screenshots as artifact:screenshot events.
screenshots._storage_doc: "db" = base64 inside the event payload (default). "s3" = upload, payload carries `url` instead.

commands._enabled_doc: On failure, ship the last N Cypress commands (name + args + pass/fail + ms) as an artifact:commands event — a lightweight command log, like Cypress Cloud. Cheap (no DOM), so it defaults ON.
commands._depth_doc: How many commands to keep in the ring before failure (1–50).

dom._enabled_doc: Serialize the DOM at the moment of failure (artifact:dom).
dom._backtrackDepth_doc: 0 = off (recommended for CI gates). 1–5 = also keep a ring of DOM snapshots from the last N commands before the failure (artifact:dom-backtrack). Costs 10–50ms per command.

s3._bucket_doc: Required for any "s3" storage mode. Missing bucket → warn once, fall back to db.
s3._endpoint_doc: Set for R2 / MinIO (enables forcePathStyle). Credentials come from the standard AWS env vars.
s3._publicBaseUrl_doc: Optional CDN/public base used to build artifact links instead of the raw bucket URL.

performance._maxParallelUploads_doc: Concurrency gate for in-flight sends; overflow queues FIFO.
performance._timeoutMs_doc: Per-send timeout (webhook abort / pg statement timeout).
performance._finalFlushMs_doc: Hard cap on the one and only wait: draining the queue in after:run.
